name: The Romance of Hua Rong
overview: Hua Rong, daughter of a general, accidentally becomes the wife of the pirate king Qin Shangcheng. However on the night of their wedding Hua Luo escaped. Qin Shangcheng is determined to hunt her down.

trailers.title: 《一夜新娘2》情路升级篇：岛主夫妇变姑侄？ 袁昊赵昭仪恋爱花样多 The Romance of Hua Rong 2【芒果TV心动频道】
